ogTitle: Captains Flat vs Carabost: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Captains Flat and Carabost.
heading: Captains Flat vs Carabost — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Captains Flat, New South Wales and Carabost, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Captains Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Carabost (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Captains Flat or Carabost safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Captains Flat has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Carabost scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Captains Flat scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Carabost scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Captains Flat or Carabost?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Captains Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
